meaning: n.草稿,草案,草图vt.起草,为...打样,设计v.草拟
examples: I've made a rough draft of the letter.
This is only the first draft of my speech.
I faxed a first draft of this article to him.
We are prepared to deliver a draft merger agreement to you and begin discussions immediately.
The draft plan is due to be published for public consultation in the spring.
